votes.rationale: motion-0026 adds explicit governed routing actions on top of the work packet contract established in motion-0025. This is the next necessary step to make agent execution lanes operable without expanding into unsafe autonomy.
The scope is appropriately bounded to execution-loop routing, handoff signals, and operator-controlled lane transitions. It preserves approval boundaries and avoids unnecessary schema churn.
Unanimous consent satisfied. This motion is a controlled extension of the packet contract work and improves the execution model by making routing and handoff actions explicit and auditable.
